2604.05887.title: HybridKV: Hybrid KV Cache Compression for Efficient Multimodal Large Language Model Inference
2604.05887.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have advanced unified reasoning over text, images, and videos, but their inference is hindered by the rapid growth of key-value (KV) caches. Each visual input expands into thousands of tokens, causing caches to scale linearly with context length and remain resident in GPU memory throughout decoding, which leads to prohibitive memory overhead and latency even on high-end GPUs. A common solution is to compress caches under a fixed allocated budget at different granularities: token-level uniformly discards less important tokens, layer-level varies retention across layers, and head-level redistributes budgets across heads. Yet these approaches stop at allocation and overlook the heterogeneous behaviors of attention heads that require distinct compression strategies. We propose HybridKV, a hybrid KV cache compression framework that integrates complementary strategies in three stages: heads are first classified into static or dynamic types using text-centric attention; then a top-down budget allocation scheme hierarchically assigns KV budgets; finally, static heads are compressed by text-prior pruning and dynamic heads by chunk-wise retrieval. Experiments on 11 multimodal benchmarks with Qwen2.5-VL-7B show that HybridKV reduces KV cache memory by up to $7.9\times$ and achieves $1.52\times$ faster decoding, with almost no performance drop or even higher relative to the full-cache MLLM.
2604.05887.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在文本、圖像和視頻上的統一推理已經取得了進展，但其推理受到關鍵值（KV）快取快速增長的阻礙。每個視覺輸入擴展為數千個標記，導致快取隨著上下文長度線性擴展，並在解碼過程中始終保留在GPU內存中，這在高端GPU上導致了過高的內存開銷和延遲。一種常見的解決方案是在不同的粒度下在固定的分配預算內壓縮快取：標記級別均勻丟棄不重要的標記，層級變化各層的保留，頭級在頭之間重新分配預算。然而，這些方法僅停留在分配階段，忽視了注意力頭的異質行為，這需要不同的壓縮策略。我們提出了HybridKV，一個混合KV快取壓縮框架，將互補策略整合為三個階段：首先使用以文本為中心的注意力將頭分類為靜態或動態類型；然後，通過自上而下的預算分配方案分層分配KV預算；最後，靜態頭通過文本優先修剪進行壓縮，動態頭則通過分塊檢索進行壓縮。在11個多模態基準上進行的實驗顯示，使用Qwen2.5-VL-7B的HybridKV將KV快取內存減少了高達$7.9\times$，並實現了$1.52\times$更快的解碼，幾乎沒有性能下降，甚至相對於全快取MLLM有更高的性能。
2604.05887.author: Bowen Zeng et.al.
2604.05887.authors: Bowen Zeng, Feiyang Ren, Jun Zhang, Xiaoling Gu, Ke Chen, Lidan Shou, Huan Li
